description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a matte black finish and metallic silver top, designed to hold a beverage. The front features a bold, gold sunburst graphic above prominent gold and white text, with additional small stars and the phrase 'RESPECT YOURSELF!' near the bottom. The sides of the can display detailed product information, including nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual text, all printed in white and gold. The back includes a barcode, recycling symbols, and a color-coded nutritional chart. The can's surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation or dents, and the pull tab is clearly visible on the top. The overall design is modern and sleek, with a focus on high-contrast colors and clean typography.
description: A tall, matte black aluminum can with gold and white graphics, detailed product information, and a silver pull tab top. The design is sleek and modern with a sunburst motif and clear, bold text.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main sunburst graphic, bold gold and white text, and the phrase 'RESPECT YOURSELF!' near the bottom.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the product description, ingredients, and multilingual text, along with recycling and website information.
description_view_2: This view displays the nutritional facts table, a color-coded chart, and additional product details in multiple languages.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the barcode, more nutritional information, and a partial view of the sunburst graphic wrapping around the can.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a matte black background with a gold sunburst graphic, bold gold and white typography, and small star accents. The design is clean and modern, with clear sections for product information and nutritional details.
